title: selaginella sajanensis
intro: Selaginella sajanensis, also known as the Sajan spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella sajanensis is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a decoction, allowing for its medicinal compounds to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
